sourceMovie.title: No Tears for the Dead
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: No Tears for the Dead works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Colombiana
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If No Tears for the Dead clicked for you, Colombiana (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: John Wick
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If No Tears for the Dead clicked for you, John Wick (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after No Tears for the Dead?
faq.answer: Try Colombiana, John Wick, John Wick: Chapter 2—each shares DNA with No Tears for the Dead while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is No Tears for the Dead?
faq.answer: No Tears for the Dead (2014) is best described as Action, Thriller, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is No Tears for the Dead worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
